design_system.name: Kitchen Intelligence Platform
design_system.description: A high-density, mission-critical interface for professional kitchens. Establishes a 'Cockpit' feel for chefs and managers. Prioritizes data legibility over decoration.
design_system.tech_stack_constraints: React + Tailwind + Shadcn (Environment). Design MUST mimic the density and structure of Enterprise Angular/Material apps as requested by user.

headings.usage: Page titles, widget headers, modal titles. Sharp, modern, legible.

data.usage: Inventory counts, prices, waste metrics, temperature logs, IDs. CRITICAL for the 'Technical' feel.

primary.description: Emerald Green. Symbolizes Freshness, Profit, and Sustainability.

secondary.description: Thermal Orange. Symbolizes Heat, Cooking, Waste Alerts, and Action.

radius.note: Almost sharp edges to convey precision and industrial reliability.

rules: Widgets must fill their container height (h-full).

page_structure.wrapper: min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground flex flex-col md:flex-row
page_structure.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-card hidden md:flex flex-col fixed h-full z-30

Card.header_style: p-4 border-b border-border flex justify-between items-center

Button.style: rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-xs shadow-none transition-all duration-200

Input.style: bg-background/50 border-input focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-sm h-9 text-sm font-mono

Table.header_style: border-b h-10 bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground font-medium uppercase text-xs tracking-wider

Badge.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-primary/20 text-primary hover:bg-primary/30

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: use only for sticky headers: bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border/50
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise texture to the background if possible to reduce 'flatness' of pure dark colors.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full gradients. Use subtle gradient borders or glows on active states.

hero_chef.alt: Professional chef plating food in dark kitchen

kitchen_staff.usage: About page, Team section, Dashboard widget background (dimmed)

ingredients_fresh.usage: Inventory page header, Recipe AI generation context

universal_guidelines: TECH STACK: React, Tailwind, Shadcn. Mimic Enterprise Angular density.
Dark Mode is MANDATORY and DEFAULT. No light mode toggle needed unless requested.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers (prices, weights, IDs, dates).
Borders are your friend in dark mode. Use 1px borders to define hierarchy, not shadows.
Data-Density: High. Avoid massive paddings inside data tables. Keep it compact.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` for testing.
Never use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use culinary terms (Mise en place, Sous Vide, FIFO, Par Levels).
Status colors: Green = Good/Fresh, Orange = Warning/Expiring, Red = Critical/Waste.
Navigation: Sidebar is preferred for enterprise apps over top nav.
